blocks.body: A React component is a JavaScript function that returns **JSX** -- an HTML-like syntax that lives inside JavaScript files. JSX gets compiled to regular function calls at build time. Each component is a self-contained unit with its own markup, logic, and sometimes styling.

blocks.heading: JSX rules to remember
items: Component names must start with a capital letter
Return a single root element (use fragments `<>...</>` to avoid extra divs)

Self-closing tags must have a slash: ``, ``, `
`
